title: Trims Begone!
description: A simple mod that allows players to take trims off armor and receive the resources back into their inventory.
body:
Since there seems to be no way to remove armor trims off of armor, or "deconstruct" armor with trims, I added one myself.

 

Features:
 

Trim Removal:
 

Armor Trims can be removed from any piece of armor using the new Armor Scraper.

 

This item is crafted using the following recipe:
![The recipe for the basic iron armor scraper.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b68a2738f00729d6e1246c57e1baa61fc2d9b2.png)

After crafting the Armor Scraper, armor trims can then be removed from a piece of armor by putting the armor in your offhand and right clicking with the armor scraper in your main hand.

Some examples of how to use the scraper are in the gallery.  The keybind to scrape is configurable.

For now, that's it for this mod.  Though simple, I feel like it was an oversight to not add implementation to remove armor in 1.20.

feel free to include this mod in any sort of modpack or project, I don't really care.
